content:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Adding optional disk-layer compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache/configure_cache

fields.summary: Adding optional disk-layer compression (gzip/zlib) with magic-header format and adaptive eviction knobs (cull_limit, eviction_policy) to Cache/configure_cache

content:
type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Added Cache(compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy) params + set_compression()/_encode_for_disk()/_decode_from_disk(); get()/put() now route disk values through these. configure_cache() gained compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy kwargs, passed to Cache(...) positionally after memory_max_entries -- if you add ttl params, please add them as keyword args (not new positional slots) when constructing Cache(...) in configure_cache() to avoid ordering conflicts between our features.

fields.summary: Added Cache(compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy) params + set_compression()/_encode_for_disk()/_decode_from_disk(); get()/put() now route disk values through these. configure_cache() gained compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy kwargs, passed to Cache(...) positionally after memory_max_entries -- if you add ttl params, please add them as keyword args (not new positional slots) when constructing Cache(...) in configure_cache() to avoid ordering conflicts between our features.

content:
type: STATUS
files: dspy/clients/cache.py,dspy/clients/__init__.py
summary: Ack. Made compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy keyword-only (added * before them in Cache.__init__) so they'll compose regardless of where your ttl param lands; configure_cache()'s Cache(...) call on my side is already all-keyword. My get()/put() only wrap the value written to/read from disk_cache (pickle+optional gzip/zlib behind a magic header b'DSPC'+codec byte); memory_cache path is untouched by me, so your LRUCache<->TTLCache swap there should be unaffected.

fields.summary: Ack. Made compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy keyword-only (added * before them in Cache.__init__) so they'll compose regardless of where your ttl param lands; configure_cache()'s Cache(...) call on my side is already all-keyword. My get()/put() only wrap the value written to/read from disk_cache (pickle+optional gzip/zlib behind a magic header b'DSPC'+codec byte); memory_cache path is untouched by me, so your LRUCache<->TTLCache swap there should be unaffected.
